Package org.apache.bookkeeper.util

Class LocalBookKeeper

java.lang.Object
org.apache.bookkeeper.util.LocalBookKeeper
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public class LocalBookKeeper extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Local Bookkeeper.
